abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single instance of SSH Command is allowed.

execute.name: Execute SSH Command
execute.description: Executes a specified command on a remote machine via SSH.

host.name: Host
host.description: Hostname or IP address of the remote machine.

key_file.name: Key File
key_file.description: Path to the SSH private key file for key-based authentication.

command.name: Command
command.description: The command to execute on the machine.

script_file.name: Script File
script_file.description: Path to the script file to execute on the machine.

check_known_hosts.name: Check Known Hosts
check_known_hosts.description: Whether to verify the machine against the known_hosts file.

known_hosts.name: Known Hosts
known_hosts.description: Known hosts in a valid format for asyncssh.

timeout.name: Timeout
timeout.description: Maximum time to wait for the command to complete (in seconds).

password_or_key_file_required.message: Either password or key file must be provided.

command_or_input.message: Either command or script file must be provided.

known_hosts_with_check_disabled.message: Known hosts provided while check known hosts is disabled.

host_key_not_verifiable.message: The host could not be verified.

connection_timed_out.message: Connection to the host timed out.
